content:
I could not complete the request because the connection to Chrome could not be established. 

Please inform the user that they need to ensure Chrome is running with remote debugging enabled. They can do this by navigating to `chrome://inspect/#remote-debugging` and checking the appropriate settings, or by starting Chrome with debugging enabled. Once that is done, they can retry the request.

toolCall.name: send_message
toolCall.argumentsJson: {"Message":"I could not complete the request because the connection to Chrome could not be established. \n\nPlease inform the user that they need to ensure Chrome is running with remote debugging enabled. They can do this by navigating to `chrome://inspect/#remote-debugging` and checking the appropriate settings, or by starting Chrome with debugging enabled. Once that is done, they can retry the request.","Recipient":"37c98387-ac01-45fb-ad5f-0d985d8c71c5","toolAction":"Reporting Chrome connection error","toolSummary":"Send error message"}
